$comment: Contract for one invocation record (FR-010). Stored as one row in the invocation_records SQLite table; shown here as the canonical structure any future export (OTLP, dashboard) must preserve. Exactly one record exists per invocation, on every exit path.

model.description: Model id used for the passes

cost_usd.description: tokens x configured per-model pricing; invoice-exactness not required

outcome.description: config_error exists in the error taxonomy but never on a record - it occurs at startup, before any invocation exists
